RemoteEngine.connectionNameHelp: After filling in, this record will be saved to the connection history for quick calls later
RemoteEngine.pemExampleContent: Please paste the content of the server.pem certificate generated when the Yak server starts here
RemoteEngine.saveHistoryHintContent: After enabling, this connection will be recorded in [Connection History] for quick connection next time
RemoteEngine.pemContent:
When starting the core server with
yak grpc --tls
, the RootCA will be printed to the screen. Copy and paste it into this input box:
RemoteEngine.saveHistoryNote: Note: {{appName}} will not upload the history to the internet
RemoteEngine.saveHistoryLocation: You can find the remote login information in your local directory (client directory)
